plan.title: Radio Cards Mosaic Artwork Treatment
plan.objective: Apply a playlist-style mosaic visual treatment to radio cards using station-relevant artwork while preserving clear card labels and playability.
in_scope: Render radio cards with station-specific mosaic tiles
/radio cards render a 3x2 artwork mosaic with top and bottom sliver overlays
out_of_scope: Do not change radio station generation rules, queue behavior, or broader page layout beyond card presentation and station-art preview selection.

tasks.summary: Add shared radio mosaic tile selection + render integration across both radio card surfaces with regression tests
acceptance_criteria: Home and Radio cards display the new mosaic layout
Targeted lint and test commands pass
tasks.outcome: Added a reusable /radio mosaic component that fetches station-relevant tracks and renders a 3x2 tile mosaic. | Implemented uniqueness-first tile selection that avoids reusing artist/cover tiles unless insufficient unique options exist. | Updated /radio station cards to use mosaic backgrounds while preserving top Radio and bottom metadata slivers.
evidence: verify: cd frontend && npx eslint app/radio/page.tsx app/radio/RadioStationMosaic.tsx app/radio/radioStationMosaicSelection.ts tests/unit/radioStationMosaicSelection.test.ts tests/unit/libraryRadioStationsGenreSelection.test.ts

pre_spec_outline.purpose_goals: Apply a playlist-style mosaic visual treatment to radio cards using station-relevant artwork while preserving clear card labels and playability.
pre_spec_outline.non_goals: Do not change radio station generation rules, queue behavior, or broader page layout beyond card presentation and station-art preview selection.

spec_outline.summary: Apply a 6-tile rectangular mosaic treatment to /radio cards using station-relevant artwork with uniqueness-first tile selection.

full_spec_outline.objective: Render radio cards with station-specific mosaic tiles
full_spec_outline.deliverable: /radio cards render a 3x2 artwork mosaic with top and bottom sliver overlays
acceptance_criteria: Each card renders six mosaic slots
Tiles prioritize unique artist and unique cover art
Tile reuse happens only when not enough unique artists/cover arts are available
Top and bottom slivers remain readable over artwork

refined_spec.summary: Use a shared utility for deterministic tile selection and a shared component for rendering/fetching mosaic art to keep behavior consistent across both card surfaces.

full_refined_spec.decision: Implement shared `buildRadioMosaicTiles` logic plus reusable `RadioStationMosaic` component
full_refined_spec.rationale: One source of truth avoids drift between Home and Radio page cards and enables direct unit testing of uniqueness rules.
acceptance_criteria: Failing tests are added before final implementation
/radio cards consume the shared mosaic component
Targeted tests and lint pass for touched files

implementation_plan.summary: 1) Add failing utility tests, 2) implement shared mosaic utility/component, 3) wire into Home and Radio cards, 4) verify and sync policy artifacts.

steps.deliverable: Add shared radio mosaic tile selection + render integration across both radio card surfaces with regression tests
acceptance_criteria: Home and Radio cards display the new mosaic layout
Targeted lint and test commands pass

delivered: Added a reusable /radio mosaic component that fetches station-relevant tracks and renders a 3x2 tile mosaic.
Implemented uniqueness-first tile selection that avoids reusing artist/cover tiles unless insufficient unique options exist.
Updated /radio station cards to use mosaic backgrounds while preserving top Radio and bottom metadata slivers.
verification_testing: verify: cd frontend && npx eslint app/radio/page.tsx app/radio/RadioStationMosaic.tsx app/radio/radioStationMosaicSelection.ts tests/unit/radioStationMosaicSelection.test.ts tests/unit/libraryRadioStationsGenreSelection.test.ts
